name: Patrick “P.J.” Hughes
summary: Former U.S. Navy E-2 Hawkeye crew member associated with recording media and post-event activity following the 2004 Nimitz encounter.
profileSummary: Former U.S. Navy E-2 Hawkeye crew member associated with recording media and post-event activity following the 2004 Nimitz encounter.
background: Former U.S. Navy E-2 Hawkeye crew member.
inclusionNote: Included because he has publicly described handling E-2 recording media and its removal after the Nimitz events. The account is based on witness interviews rather than a released official chain-of-custody record.

referenceSources.label: Scientific analysis of the Nimitz encounter
